scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc -p packages/kernel/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/storage/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/policy/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/adapters-git/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/adapters-models/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/adapters-tools/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/compat-gsd/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/ui-tui/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
